name: Dustbound Oath

abilities.name: Just Doing My Duty
abilities.text: After this model succeeds in an attack action targeting an enemy model that is on the enemy table half, this model gains a Badge token.

abilities.name: Frontier's Finest
abilities.text:
When this model ends its activation, it may remove a Badge token to resolve one of the following effects:
Order Restored: Remove a Scheme marker within 2" of this model.
Home on the Range: Move up to 4".
Kick Up Dust: Allies within 2" of this model gain a Hidden token.

extraction_notes: Card shows keyword abilities granted to specific model scope with two abilities: Just Doing My Duty and Frontier's Finest
Frontier's Finest has three sub-options that can be chosen when resolving the ability
